 181        #region Unity Integration
 182        [MenuItem("Tools/Edgegap Hosting")]
 183        public static void ShowEdgegapToolWindow()
 0184        {
 0185            EdgegapWindowV2 window = GetWindow<EdgegapWindowV2>();
 0186            window.titleContent = new GUIContent("Edgegap Hosting"); // MIRROR CHANGE: 'Edgegap Server Management' is to
 0187            window.maxSize = new Vector2(600, 900);
 0188            window.minSize = window.maxSize;
 0189        }
 190
 191        // Compiler symbols can be used by other plugin developers to detect presence of Edgegap plugin
 192        [InitializeOnLoadMethod]
 193        public static void AddDefineSymbols()
 0194        {
 195            // check if defined first, otherwise adding the symbol causes an infinite loop of recompilation
 196#if !EDGEGAP_PLUGIN_SERVERS
 197            // Get data about current target group
 198            bool standaloneAndServer = false;
 199            BuildTarget buildTarget = EditorUserBuildSettings.activeBuildTarget;
 200            BuildTargetGroup buildTargetGroup = BuildPipeline.GetBuildTargetGroup(buildTarget);
 201            if (buildTargetGroup == BuildTargetGroup.Standalone)
 202            {
 203                StandaloneBuildSubtarget standaloneSubTarget =
 204                    EditorUserBuildSettings.standaloneBuildSubtarget;
 205                if (standaloneSubTarget == StandaloneBuildSubtarget.Server)
 206                    standaloneAndServer = true;
 207            }
 208
 209            // Prepare named target, depending on above stuff
 210            NamedBuildTarget namedBuildTarget;
 211            if (standaloneAndServer)
 212                namedBuildTarget = NamedBuildTarget.Server;
 213            else
 214                namedBuildTarget = NamedBuildTarget.FromBuildTargetGroup(buildTargetGroup);
 215
 216            // Set universal compiler macro
 217            PlayerSettings.SetScriptingDefineSymbols(
 218                namedBuildTarget,
 219                $"{PlayerSettings.GetScriptingDefineSymbols(namedBuildTarget)};{EdgegapWindowMetadata.KEY_COMPILER_MACRO
 220            );
 221#endif
 0222        }
 223
 224        protected void OnEnable()
 0225        {
 226#if UNITY_2021_3_OR_NEWER // only load stylesheet in supported Unity versions, otherwise it shows errors in U2020
 227            // Set root VisualElement and style: V2 still uses EdgegapWindow.[uxml|uss]
 228            // BEGIN MIRROR CHANGE
 0229            _visualTree = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<VisualTreeAsset>(
 230                $"{_stylesheetPath}{Path.DirectorySeparatorChar}EdgegapWindow.uxml"
 231            );
 0232            StyleSheet styleSheet = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<StyleSheet>(
 233                $"{_stylesheetPath}{Path.DirectorySeparatorChar}EdgegapWindow.uss"
 234            );
 235            // END MIRROR CHANGE
 0236            rootVisualElement.styleSheets.Add(styleSheet);
 237#endif
 0238        }
 239
 240        public async void CreateGUI()
 0241        {
 242            // the UI requires 'GroupBox', which is not available in Unity 2019/2020.
 243            // showing it will break all of Unity's Editor UIs, not just this one.
 244            // instead, show a warning that the Edgegap plugin only works on Unity 2021+
 245#if !UNITY_2021_3_OR_NEWER
 246            Debug.LogWarning(
 247                "The Edgegap Hosting plugin requires UIToolkit in Unity 2021.3 or newer. Please upgrade your Unity versi
 248            );
 249#else
 250            // Get UI elements from UI Builder
 0251            rootVisualElement.Clear();
 0252            _visualTree.CloneTree(rootVisualElement);
 253
 254            // Register callbacks and sync UI builder elements to fields here
 0255            InitUIElements();
 256
 257            // TODO: Load persistent data?
 258
 259            // Only show the rest of the form if apiToken is verified
 0260            _postAuthContainer.SetEnabled(_isApiTokenVerified);
 261
 0262            await InitializeState(); // API calls
 263#endif
 0264        }

 266        /// <summary>The user closed the window. Save the data.</summary>
 267        protected void OnDisable()
 0268        {
 269#if UNITY_2021_3_OR_NEWER // only load stylesheet in supported Unity versions, otherwise it shows errors in U2020
 270            // sometimes this is called without having been registered, throwing NRE
 0271            unregisterUICallbacks();
 272#endif
 0273        }

 483        private void closeDisableGroups()
 0484        {
 0485            _serverBuildFoldout.SetValueWithoutNotify(false);
 0486            _containerizeFoldout.SetValueWithoutNotify(false);
 0487            _localTestFoldout.SetValueWithoutNotify(false);
 0488            _createAppFoldout.SetValueWithoutNotify(false);
 0489            _deployAppFoldout.SetValueWithoutNotify(false);
 0490            _nextStepsFoldout.SetValueWithoutNotify(false);
 491
 0492            _serverBuildFoldout.SetEnabled(false);
 0493            _containerizeFoldout.SetEnabled(false);
 0494            _localTestFoldout.SetEnabled(false);
 0495            _createAppFoldout.SetEnabled(false);
 0496            _deployAppFoldout.SetEnabled(false);
 0497            _nextStepsFoldout.SetEnabled(false);
 0498        }
 499
 500        /// <summary>
 501        /// Register UI callbacks. We'll want to save for persistence, validate, etc
 502        /// </summary>
 503        private void registerUICallbacks()
 0504        {
 0505            _debugBtn.clickable.clicked += onDebugBtnClick;
 506
 0507            _edgegapSignInBtn.clickable.clicked += OnEdgegapSignInBtnClick;
 0508            _apiTokenGetBtn.clickable.clicked += OpenGetTokenUrl;
 0509            _apiTokenInput.RegisterCallback<FocusInEvent>(onApiTokenInputFocusIn);
 0510            _apiTokenInput.RegisterCallback<FocusOutEvent>(onApiTokenInputFocusOut);
 0511            _apiTokenVerifyBtn.clickable.clicked += onApiTokenVerifyBtnClick;
 0512            _signOutBtn.clickable.clicked += OnSignOutBtnClickAsync;
 0513            _joinEdgegapDiscordBtn.clickable.clicked += OnDiscordBtnClick;
 514
 0515            _infoLinuxRequirementsBtn.clickable.clicked += OnLinuxInfoClick;
 0516            _installLinuxRequirementsBtn.clickable.clicked += OnInstallLinuxBtnClick;
 0517            _buildParamsBtn.clickable.clicked += OnOpenBuildParamsBtnClick;
 0518            _buildFolderNameInput.RegisterCallback<FocusOutEvent>(OnFolderNameInputFocusOut);
 0519            _serverBuildBtn.clickable.clicked += OnBuildServerBtnClick;
 520
 0521            _infoDockerRequirementsBtn.clickable.clicked += OnDockerInfoClick;
 0522            _validateDockerRequirementsBtn.clickable.clicked += OnValidateDockerBtnClick;
 0523            _buildPathInput.RegisterCallback<FocusInEvent>(OnBuildPathInputFocusIn);
 0524            _buildPathResetBtn.clickable.clicked += OnResetBuildPathBtnClick;
 0525            _containerizeImageNameInput.RegisterValueChangedCallback(OnContainerizeInputsChanged);
 0526            _containerizeImageNameInput.RegisterCallback<FocusInEvent>(
 527                OnContainerizeImageNameInputFocusIn
 528            );
 0529            _containerizeImageNameInput.RegisterCallback<FocusOutEvent>(
 530                OnContainerizeImageNameInputFocusOut
 531            );
 0532            _containerizeImageTagInput.RegisterValueChangedCallback(OnContainerizeInputsChanged);
 0533            _containerizeImageTagInput.RegisterCallback<FocusInEvent>(
 534                OnContainerizeImageTagInputFocusIn
 535            );
 0536            _containerizeImageTagInput.RegisterCallback<FocusOutEvent>(
 537                OnContainerizeImageTagInputFocusOut
 538            );
 0539            _dockerfilePathResetBtn.clickable.clicked += OnResetDockerfilePathBtnClick;
 0540            _dockerfilePathInput.RegisterCallback<FocusInEvent>(OnDockerfilePathInputFocusIn);
 0541            _containerizeServerBtn.clickable.clicked += OnContainerizeBtnClickAsync;
 542
 0543            _localTestImageInput.RegisterValueChangedCallback(OnLocalTestInputsChanged);
 0544            _localTestImageShowDropdownBtn.clickable.clicked += OnLocalTestImageDropdownClick;
 0545            _localTestImageInput.RegisterCallback<FocusInEvent>(OnLocalTestInputFocusIn);
 0546            _localTestDockerRunInput.RegisterCallback<FocusOutEvent>(
 547                OnLocalTestDockerParamsFocusOut
 548            );
 0549            _localTestDeployBtn.clickable.clicked += OnLocalTestDeployClick;
 0550            _localTestTerminateBtn.clickable.clicked += OnLocalTestTerminateCLick;
 0551            _localTestDiscordHelpBtn.clickable.clicked += OnDiscordBtnClick;
 0552            _localTestInfoConnectBtn.clickable.clicked += OnLocalContainerConnectLinkClick;
 553
 0554            _createAppNameShowDropdownBtn.clickable.clicked += OnCreateAppNameDropdownClick;
 0555            _createAppNameInput.RegisterCallback<FocusOutEvent>(OnCreateAppNameInputFocusOut);
 0556            _serverImageNameInput.RegisterValueChangedCallback(OnCreateInputsChanged);
 0557            _serverImageTagInput.RegisterValueChangedCallback(OnCreateInputsChanged);
 0558            _portMappingLabelLink.clickable.clicked += OnPortsMappingLinkClick;
 0559            _uploadImageCreateAppBtn.clickable.clicked += OnUploadImageCreateAppBtnClickAsync;
 0560            _appInfoLabelLink.clickable.clicked += OnYourAppLinkClick;
 561
 0562            _deployAppNameInput.RegisterCallback<FocusInEvent>(OnDeployAppNameInputFocusIn);
 0563            _deployAppNameInput.RegisterValueChangedCallback(OnDeployAppNameInputChanged);
 0564            _deployAppNameShowDropdownBtn.clickable.clicked += OnDeployAppNameDropdownClick;
 0565            _deployAppVersionInput.RegisterCallback<FocusInEvent>(OnDeployAppVersionInputFocusIn);
 0566            _deployAppVersionInput.RegisterValueChangedCallback(OnDeployAppVersionInputChanged);
 0567            _deployAppVersionShowDropdownBtn.clickable.clicked += OnDeployAppVersionDropdownClick;
 0568            _deployLimitLabelLink.clickable.clicked += OnDeployLimitLinkClick;
 0569            _deployAppBtn.clickable.clicked += OnDeploymentCreateBtnClick;
 0570            _stopLastDeployBtn.clickable.clicked += OnStopLastDeployClick;
 0571            _discordHelpBtn.clickable.clicked += OnDiscordBtnClick;
 572
 0573            _serverConnectLink.clickable.clicked += OnServerConnectLinkClick;
 0574            _gen2MatchmakerLabelLink.clickable.clicked += OnGen2MatchmakerLinkClick;
 0575            _lifecycleManageLabelLink.clickable.clicked += OnScalingLifecycleLinkClick;
 0576        }
 577
 578        /// <summary>
 579        /// Prevents memory leaks, mysterious errors and "ghost" values set from a previous session.
 580        /// Should parity the opposite of registerUICallbacks().
 581        /// </summary>
 582        private void unregisterUICallbacks()
 0583        {
 0584            _debugBtn.clickable.clicked -= onDebugBtnClick;
 585
 0586            _edgegapSignInBtn.clickable.clicked -= OnEdgegapSignInBtnClick;
 0587            _apiTokenGetBtn.clickable.clicked -= OpenGetTokenUrl;
 0588            _apiTokenInput.UnregisterCallback<FocusInEvent>(onApiTokenInputFocusIn);
 0589            _apiTokenInput.UnregisterCallback<FocusOutEvent>(onApiTokenInputFocusOut);
 0590            _apiTokenVerifyBtn.clickable.clicked -= onApiTokenVerifyBtnClick;
 0591            _signOutBtn.clickable.clicked -= OnSignOutBtnClickAsync;
 0592            _joinEdgegapDiscordBtn.clickable.clicked -= OnDiscordBtnClick;
 593
 0594            _infoLinuxRequirementsBtn.clickable.clicked -= OnLinuxInfoClick;
 0595            _installLinuxRequirementsBtn.clickable.clicked -= OnInstallLinuxBtnClick;
 0596            _buildParamsBtn.clickable.clicked -= OnOpenBuildParamsBtnClick;
 0597            _buildFolderNameInput.UnregisterCallback<FocusOutEvent>(OnFolderNameInputFocusOut);
 0598            _serverBuildBtn.clickable.clicked -= OnBuildServerBtnClick;
 599
 0600            _infoDockerRequirementsBtn.clickable.clicked -= OnDockerInfoClick;
 0601            _validateDockerRequirementsBtn.clickable.clicked -= OnValidateDockerBtnClick;
 0602            _buildPathInput.UnregisterCallback<FocusInEvent>(OnBuildPathInputFocusIn);
 0603            _buildPathResetBtn.clickable.clicked -= OnResetBuildPathBtnClick;
 0604            _containerizeImageNameInput.UnregisterValueChangedCallback(OnContainerizeInputsChanged);
 0605            _containerizeImageNameInput.UnregisterCallback<FocusInEvent>(
 606                OnContainerizeImageNameInputFocusIn
 607            );
 0608            _containerizeImageNameInput.UnregisterCallback<FocusOutEvent>(
 609                OnContainerizeImageNameInputFocusOut
 610            );
 0611            _containerizeImageTagInput.UnregisterValueChangedCallback(OnContainerizeInputsChanged);
 0612            _containerizeImageTagInput.UnregisterCallback<FocusInEvent>(
 613                OnContainerizeImageTagInputFocusIn
 614            );
 0615            _containerizeImageTagInput.UnregisterCallback<FocusOutEvent>(
 616                OnContainerizeImageTagInputFocusOut
 617            );
 0618            _dockerfilePathResetBtn.clickable.clicked -= OnResetDockerfilePathBtnClick;
 0619            _dockerfilePathInput.UnregisterCallback<FocusInEvent>(OnDockerfilePathInputFocusIn);
 0620            _containerizeServerBtn.clickable.clicked -= OnContainerizeBtnClickAsync;
 621
 0622            _localTestImageInput.UnregisterCallback<FocusInEvent>(OnLocalTestInputFocusIn);
 0623            _localTestImageInput.UnregisterValueChangedCallback(OnLocalTestInputsChanged);
 0624            _localTestImageShowDropdownBtn.clickable.clicked -= OnLocalTestImageDropdownClick;
 0625            _localTestDockerRunInput.UnregisterCallback<FocusOutEvent>(
 626                OnLocalTestDockerParamsFocusOut
 627            );
 0628            _localTestDeployBtn.clickable.clicked -= OnLocalTestDeployClick;
 0629            _localTestTerminateBtn.clickable.clicked -= OnLocalTestTerminateCLick;
 0630            _localTestDiscordHelpBtn.clickable.clicked -= OnDiscordBtnClick;
 0631            _localTestInfoConnectBtn.clickable.clicked -= OnLocalContainerConnectLinkClick;
 632
 0633            _createAppNameShowDropdownBtn.clickable.clicked -= OnCreateAppNameDropdownClick;
 0634            _createAppNameInput.UnregisterCallback<FocusOutEvent>(OnCreateAppNameInputFocusOut);
 0635            _serverImageNameInput.UnregisterValueChangedCallback(OnCreateInputsChanged);
 0636            _serverImageTagInput.UnregisterValueChangedCallback(OnCreateInputsChanged);
 0637            _portMappingLabelLink.clickable.clicked -= OnPortsMappingLinkClick;
 0638            _uploadImageCreateAppBtn.clickable.clicked -= OnUploadImageCreateAppBtnClickAsync;
 0639            _appInfoLabelLink.clickable.clicked -= OnYourAppLinkClick;
 640
 0641            _deployAppNameInput.UnregisterCallback<FocusInEvent>(OnDeployAppNameInputFocusIn);
 0642            _deployAppNameInput.UnregisterValueChangedCallback(OnDeployAppNameInputChanged);
 0643            _deployAppNameShowDropdownBtn.clickable.clicked -= OnDeployAppNameDropdownClick;
 0644            _deployAppVersionInput.UnregisterCallback<FocusInEvent>(OnDeployAppVersionInputFocusIn);
 0645            _deployAppVersionInput.UnregisterValueChangedCallback(OnDeployAppVersionInputChanged);
 0646            _deployAppVersionShowDropdownBtn.clickable.clicked -= OnDeployAppVersionDropdownClick;
 0647            _deployLimitLabelLink.clickable.clicked -= OnDeployLimitLinkClick;
 0648            _deployAppBtn.clickable.clicked -= OnDeploymentCreateBtnClick;
 0649            _stopLastDeployBtn.clickable.clicked -= OnStopLastDeployClick;
 0650            _discordHelpBtn.clickable.clicked -= OnDiscordBtnClick;
 651
 0652            _serverConnectLink.clickable.clicked -= OnServerConnectLinkClick;
 0653            _gen2MatchmakerLabelLink.clickable.clicked -= OnGen2MatchmakerLinkClick;
 0654            _lifecycleManageLabelLink.clickable.clicked -= OnScalingLifecycleLinkClick;
 0655        }
 656
 657        private void initToggleDynamicUI()
 0658        {
 0659            hideResultLabels();
 660
 661            // ApiToken
 0662            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(_apiToken))
 0663            {
 0664                string apiTokenBase64Str = EditorPrefs.GetString(
 665                    EdgegapWindowMetadata.API_TOKEN_KEY_STR,
 666                    null
 667                );
 668
 0669                if (apiTokenBase64Str == null)
 0670                    return;
 671
 0672                string decodedApiToken = Base64Decode(apiTokenBase64Str);
 0673                _apiTokenInput.SetValueWithoutNotify(decodedApiToken);
 0674            }
 675
 0676            _debugBtn.visible = EdgegapWindowMetadata.SHOW_DEBUG_BTN;
 0677        }
 678
 679        private void ResetState()
 0680        {
 681            // reset input values
 0682            _buildFolderNameInput.SetValueWithoutNotify("");
 0683            _buildPathInput.SetValueWithoutNotify("");
 0684            _containerizeImageNameInput.SetValueWithoutNotify("");
 0685            _containerizeImageTagInput.SetValueWithoutNotify("");
 0686            _dockerfilePathInput.SetValueWithoutNotify("");
 0687            _optionalDockerParamsInput.SetValueWithoutNotify("");
 0688            _createAppNameInput.SetValueWithoutNotify("");
 0689            _serverImageNameInput.SetValueWithoutNotify("");
 0690            _serverImageTagInput.SetValueWithoutNotify("");
 0691            _deployAppNameInput.SetValueWithoutNotify("");
 0692            _deployAppVersionInput.SetValueWithoutNotify("");
 693
 0694            _isApiTokenVerified = false;
 0695            _credentials = null;
 0696            _userExternalIp = null;
 0697            _containerRegistryUrl = null;
 0698            _containerProject = null;
 0699            _containerUsername = null;
 0700            _containerToken = null;
 0701            _localImages = null;
 0702            _storedAppNames = null;
 0703            _storedAppVersions = null;
 704
 0705            hideResultLabels();
 0706            closeDisableGroups();
 0707            ToggleIsConnectedContainers(false);
 0708        }
 709
 710        /// <summary>For example, result labels (success/err) should be hidden on init</summary>
 711        private void hideResultLabels()
 0712        {
 0713            _serverBuildResultLabel.visible = false;
 0714            _containerizeServerResultLabel.visible = false;
 0715            _localTestResultLabel.style.display = DisplayStyle.None;
 0716            _deployResultLabel.style.display = DisplayStyle.None;
 0717            _linuxRequirementsResultLabel.visible = false;
 0718            _dockerRequirementsResultLabel.visible = false;
 0719        }
 720        #endregion
 721
 722        #region Fns / Debug
 723        /// <summary>
 724        /// Experiment here! You may want to log what you're doing
 725        /// in case you inadvertently leave it on.
 726        /// </summary>
 0727        private void onDebugBtnClick() => debugEnableAllGroups();
 728
 729        private void debugEnableAllGroups()
 0730        {
 0731            Debug.Log("debugEnableAllGroups");
 732
 0733            _serverBuildFoldout.SetEnabled(true);
 0734            _containerizeFoldout.SetEnabled(true);
 0735            _localTestFoldout.SetEnabled(true);
 0736            _createAppFoldout.SetEnabled(true);
 0737            _deployAppFoldout.SetEnabled(true);
 0738            _nextStepsFoldout.SetEnabled(true);
 0739        }
 740        #endregion
 741
 742        #region Fns / Connect
 743        /// <summary>
 744        /// "Sign in" btn click
 745        /// </summary>
 746        private void OnEdgegapSignInBtnClick()
 0747        {
 0748            if (!_isApiTokenVerified)
 0749            {
 0750                OpenGetTokenUrl();
 0751            }
 0752            ToggleIsConnectedContainers(true);
 0753        }
 754
 755        private void OpenGetTokenUrl()
 0756        {
 0757            OpenEdgegapURL(EdgegapWindowMetadata.EDGEGAP_GET_A_TOKEN_URL);
 0758        }
 759
 760        private void onApiTokenInputFocusIn(FocusInEvent evt)
 0761        {
 0762            _apiTokenInput.isPasswordField = false;
 0763        }
 764
 765        private void onApiTokenInputFocusOut(FocusOutEvent evt)
 0766        {
 0767            _apiTokenInput.isPasswordField = true;
 768
 0769            _isApiTokenVerified = false;
 0770            _postAuthContainer.SetEnabled(false);
 0771            closeDisableGroups();
 772
 773            // Toggle "Verify" btn on 1+ char entered
 0774            if (_apiToken.Length > 0)
 0775            {
 0776                onApiTokenVerifyBtnClick();
 0777            }
 0778        }
 779
 780        private void onApiTokenVerifyBtnClick()
 0781        {
 0782            ResetState();
 0783            initToggleDynamicUI();
 0784            _ = verifyApiTokenGetRegistryCreds();
 0785            _ = InitializeState();
 0786            _ = checkForUpdates();
 0787        }
 788
 789        /// <summary>
 790        /// Verifies token => apps/container groups -> gets registry creds (if any).
 791        /// </summary>
 792        private async Task verifyApiTokenGetRegistryCreds()
 0793        {
 0794            if (IsLogLevelDebug)
 0795                Debug.Log("verifyApiTokenGetRegistryCredsAsync");
 796
 797            // Disable most ui while we verify
 0798            _isApiTokenVerified = false;
 0799            _signOutBtn.SetEnabled(false);
 0800            UpdateUI();
 0801            hideResultLabels();
 802
 0803            EdgegapWizardApi wizardApi = new EdgegapWizardApi(
 804                EdgegapWindowMetadata.API_ENVIRONMENT,
 805                _apiToken,
 806                EdgegapWindowMetadata.LOG_LEVEL
 807            );
 0808            EdgegapHttpResult initQuickStartResultCode = await wizardApi.InitQuickStart();
 809
 0810            _signOutBtn.SetEnabled(true);
 0811            _isApiTokenVerified = initQuickStartResultCode.IsResultCode204;
 812
 0813            if (!_isApiTokenVerified)
 0814            {
 0815                UpdateUI();
 0816                return;
 817            }
 818
 819            // Verified: Let's see if we have active registry credentials // TODO: This will later be a result model
 0820            EdgegapHttpResult<GetRegistryCredentialsResult> getRegistryCredentialsResult =
 821                await wizardApi.GetRegistryCredentials();
 822
 0823            if (getRegistryCredentialsResult.IsResultCode200)
 0824            {
 825                // Success
 0826                _credentials = getRegistryCredentialsResult.Data;
 0827                EditorPrefs.SetString(
 828                    EdgegapWindowMetadata.API_TOKEN_KEY_STR,
 829                    Base64Encode(_apiToken)
 830                );
 831
 0832                if (IsLogLevelDebug)
 0833                    Debug.Log("SetContainerRegistryData");
 834
 0835                if (_credentials == null)
 0836                    throw new Exception($"!{nameof(_credentials)}");
 837
 0838                _containerRegistryUrl = _credentials.RegistryUrl;
 0839                _containerProject = _credentials.Project;
 0840                _containerUsername = _credentials.Username;
 0841                _containerToken = _credentials.Token;
 0842                Debug.Log("Edgegap API token verified successfully.");
 0843            }
 844            else
 0845            {
 0846                ShowErrorDialog(
 847                    $"Couldn't retrieve Edgegap registry credentials, try re-logging.\n\n{getRegistryCredentialsResult.D
 848                );
 0849            }
 850
 851            // Unlock the rest of the form, whether we prefill the container registry or not
 0852            UpdateUI();
 0853        }
 854
 855        /// <summary>
 856        /// Fetch latest github release and compare with local package.json version
 857        /// </summary>
 858        private async Task checkForUpdates()
 0859        {
 860            // get local package.json version
 0861            DirectoryInfo thisScriptDir = new DirectoryInfo(ThisScriptPath);
 0862            PackageJSON local = PackageJSON.PackageJSONFromJSON(
 863                $"{thisScriptDir.Parent.Parent.ToString()}{Path.DirectorySeparatorChar}package.json"
 864            );
 865
 866            // get latest release from github repository
 0867            string releaseJSON = await GithubRelease.GithubReleaseFromAPI();
 0868            GithubRelease latest = GithubRelease.GithubReleaseFromJSON(releaseJSON);
 869
 0870            if (local.version != latest.name)
 0871            {
 0872                Debug.LogWarning(
 873                    $"Please update your Edgegap Quickstart plugin - local version `{local.version}` < latest version `{
 874                );
 0875            }
 0876        }
 877
 878        /// <summary>
 879        /// "Sign out" btn click
 880        /// </summary>
 881        private void OnSignOutBtnClickAsync()
 0882        {
 0883            EditorPrefs.DeleteKey(EdgegapWindowMetadata.API_TOKEN_KEY_STR);
 0884            _apiTokenInput.SetValueWithoutNotify("");
 0885            ResetState();
 0886        }
 887
 888        /// <summary>
 889        /// Change between the view when connected or the view when not connected
 890        /// </summary>
 891        /// <param name="isConnected"></param>
 892        private void ToggleIsConnectedContainers(bool isConnected)
 0893        {
 0894            _preAuthContainer.SetEnabled(!isConnected);
 0895            _preAuthContainer.style.display = isConnected ? DisplayStyle.None : DisplayStyle.Flex;
 896
 0897            _authContainer.SetEnabled(isConnected);
 0898            _authContainer.style.display = isConnected ? DisplayStyle.Flex : DisplayStyle.None;
 0899        }
 900        #endregion
 901

 903        private void OnLinuxInfoClick() =>
 0904            OpenEdgegapDocsURL(EdgegapWindowMetadata.EDGEGAP_DOC_PLUGIN_GUIDE_PATH);
 905
 906        /// <summary>
 907        /// Linux server build requirements install btn click
 908        /// </summary>
 909        private async void OnInstallLinuxBtnClick()
 0910        {
 0911            if (
 912                !BuildPipeline.IsBuildTargetSupported(
 913                    BuildTargetGroup.Standalone,
 914                    BuildTarget.StandaloneLinux64
 915                )
 916            )
 0917            {
 918                //ProgressCounter = 0;
 919
 920                //await EdgegapBuildUtils.InstallLinuxModules(Application.unityVersion,
 921                //    outputReciever: status => ShowWorkInProgress("Installing linux support modules", status),
 922                //    errorReciever: (msg) => OnBuildContainerizeUploadError(msg, _linuxRequirementsResultLabel, "There 
 923                //);
 924
 925                //OnBuildContainerizeUploadSuccess(_linuxRequirementsResultLabel, "Requirements installed. Don't forget 
 926
 0927                ShowErrorDialog(
 928                    null,
 929                    _linuxRequirementsResultLabel,
 930                    "Requirements not currently installed."
 931                );
 0932                await Task.Delay(1);
 0933                OpenEdgegapDocsURL(EdgegapWindowMetadata.EDGEGAP_DOC_PLUGIN_GUIDE_PATH);
 0934            }
 935            else
 0936            {
 0937                OnBuildContainerizeUploadSuccess(
 938                    _linuxRequirementsResultLabel,
 939                    "Requirements installed."
 940                );
 0941            }
 0942        }

 944        /// <summary>

 0948        {
 949#if UNITY_2021_3_OR_NEWER
 0950            EditorWindow.GetWindow(
 951                System.Type.GetType("UnityEditor.BuildPlayerWindow,UnityEditor")
 952            );

 0956        }

 958        private void OnFolderNameInputFocusOut(FocusOutEvent evt)
 0959        {
 0960            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(_buildFolderNameInput.value))
 0961            {
 0962                _buildFolderNameInput.value = _buildFolderNameInputDefault;
 0963            }
 0964        }
 965
 966        /// <summary>
 967        /// "Build server" btn click
 968        /// Process UI + validation before/after API logic
 969        /// </summary>
 970        private void OnBuildServerBtnClick()
 0971        {
 972            try
 0973            {
 0974                _serverBuildBtn.SetEnabled(false);
 0975                hideResultLabels();
 976
 977                // build server
 0978                if (IsLogLevelDebug)
 0979                    Debug.Log("buildServer");
 0980                ProgressCounter = 0;
 981
 0982                if (
 983                    !BuildPipeline.IsBuildTargetSupported(
 984                        BuildTargetGroup.Standalone,
 985                        BuildTarget.StandaloneLinux64
 986                    )
 987                )
 0988                {
 0989                    throw new Exception(
 990                        $"Linux Build Support is missing.\n\nPlease install it via the plugin, or open Unity Hub -> Inst
 991                    );
 992                }
 993
 0994                string folderName = !string.IsNullOrEmpty(_buildFolderNameInput.value)
 995                    ? _buildFolderNameInput.value
 996                    : _buildFolderNameInputDefault;
 997
 0998                BuildReport buildResult = EdgegapBuildUtils.BuildServer(folderName);
 0999                if (buildResult.summary.result != BuildResult.Succeeded)
 01000                {
 01001                    Debug.LogWarning(buildResult.summary.result.ToString());
 01002                }
 1003                else
 01004                {
 01005                    OnBuildContainerizeUploadSuccess(_serverBuildResultLabel, "Build succeeded.");
 01006                }
 1007
 01008                _containerizeFoldout.SetValueWithoutNotify(true);
 01009                _buildPathInput.SetValueWithoutNotify(_buildPathInputDefault);
 01010            }
 01011            catch (Exception e)
 01012            {
 01013                Debug.LogError($"OnBuildServerBtnClick Error: {e}");
 01014                ShowErrorDialog(e.Message, _serverBuildResultLabel, "Build failed (see logs).");
 01015            }
 1016            finally
 01017            {
 01018                EditorUtility.ClearProgressBar();
 01019                _serverBuildBtn.SetEnabled(true);
 01020            }
 01021        }
 1022        #endregion
 1023
 1024        #region Fns / Containerize
 1025        private void OnDockerInfoClick() =>
 01026            OpenEdgegapDocsURL(EdgegapWindowMetadata.EDGEGAP_DOC_USAGE_REQUIREMENTS_PATH);
 1027
 1028        /// <summary>
 1029        /// Validate Docker installation btn click
 1030        /// </summary>
 1031        private void OnValidateDockerBtnClick()
 01032        {
 01033            _ = ValidateDockerRequirement();
 01034        }
 1035
 1036        private async Task<string> ValidateDockerRequirement()
 01037        {
 01038            _validateDockerRequirementsBtn.SetEnabled(false);
 01039            hideResultLabels();
 1040            string error;
 1041            try
 01042            {
 01043                error = await EdgegapBuildUtils.DockerSetupAndInstallationCheck(
 1044                    _dockerfilePathInputDefault
 1045                );
 01046            }
 01047            catch (Exception e)
 01048            {
 01049                error = e.Message;
 01050            }
 01051            _validateDockerRequirementsBtn.SetEnabled(true);
 1052
 01053            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(error))
 01054            {
 01055                ShowErrorDialog(
 1056                    error.Contains("docker daemon is not running")
 1057                    || error.Contains("dockerDesktop")
 1058                        ? string.Join(
 1059                            "\n\n",
 1060                            new string[]
 1061                            {
 1062                                "Docker is installed, but the daemon/app (e.g. Docker Desktop) is not running.",
 1063                                "Please start Docker and try again.",
 1064                            }
 1065                        )
 1066                        : string.Join(
 1067                            "\n\n",
 1068                            new string[]
 1069                            {
 1070                                "Docker installation not found. Docker can be downloaded from:",
 1071                                "https://www.docker.com/",
 1072                            }
 1073                        ),
 1074                    _dockerRequirementsResultLabel,
 1075                    "There was a problem."
 1076                );
 01077                return error;
 1078            }
 1079            else
 01080            {
 01081                OnBuildContainerizeUploadSuccess(
 1082                    _dockerRequirementsResultLabel,
 1083                    "Docker is running."
 1084                );
 01085            }
 01086            return null;
 01087        }
 1088
 1089        /// <summary>
 1090        /// When field gains focus, open File Explorer to select folder path
 1091        /// </summary>
 1092        /// <param name="evt"></param>
 1093        private void OnBuildPathInputFocusIn(FocusInEvent evt)
 01094        {
 01095            string selectedPath = EditorUtility.OpenFolderPanel(
 1096                "Select Build Folder",
 1097                ProjectRootPath,
 1098                ""
 1099            );
 1100
 01101            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(selectedPath))
 01102            {
 01103                if (selectedPath.Contains(ProjectRootPath.Replace('\\', '/')))
 01104                {
 01105                    string pathFromProjectRoot = selectedPath.Split(
 1106                        ProjectRootPath.Replace('\\', '/') + '/'
 1107                    )[1];
 01108                    _buildPathInput.value = pathFromProjectRoot;
 01109                }
 1110                else
 01111                {
 01112                    ShowErrorDialog(
 1113                        "The selected build folder couldn't be found within the project."
 1114                    );
 01115                }
 01116            }
 01117        }
 1118
 1119        /// <summary>
 1120        /// Reset Build Path input value btn click
 1121        /// </summary>
 1122        private void OnResetBuildPathBtnClick()
 01123        {
 01124            _buildPathInput.value = _buildPathInputDefault;
 01125        }
 1126
 1127        /// <summary>
 1128        /// On change, toggle containerize btn if all required inputs in Containerize section are filled
 1129        /// </summary>

 01132        {

 01134        }
 1135
 1136        private bool CheckFilledContainerizeServerInputs()
 01137        {
 01138            return _containerizeImageNameInput.value.Length > 0
 1139                && _containerizeImageTagInput.value.Length > 0;
 01140        }
 1141
 1142        private void OnContainerizeImageNameInputFocusIn(FocusInEvent evt)
 01143        {
 01144            TogglePlaceholder(
 1145                _containerizeImageNameInput,

 1147                true
 1148            );

 1150
 1151        private void OnContainerizeImageNameInputFocusOut(FocusOutEvent evt)
 01152        {

 1157            );

 1165        private void OnContainerizeImageTagInputFocusOut(FocusOutEvent evt)
 01166        {

 1169
 1170        /// <summary>
 1171        /// When field gains focus, open File Explorer to select file path
 1172        /// </summary>
 1173        /// <param name="evt"></param>
 1174        private void OnDockerfilePathInputFocusIn(FocusInEvent evt)
 01175        {
 01176            string selectedPath = EditorUtility.OpenFilePanel(
 1177                "Select Dockerfile",
 1178                ProjectRootPath,
 1179                ""
 1180            );
 1181
 01182            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(selectedPath))
 01183            {
 01184                _dockerfilePathInput.value = selectedPath;
 01185            }
 01186        }
 1187
 1188        /// <summary>
 1189        /// Reset Dockerfile Path input value btn click
 1190        /// </summary>
 1191        private void OnResetDockerfilePathBtnClick()
 01192        {
 01193            _dockerfilePathInput.value = _dockerfilePathInputDefault;
 01194        }
 1195
 1196        /// <summary>
 1197        /// "Containerize with Docker" btn click
 1198        /// Process UI + validation before/after API logic
 1199        /// </summary>
 1200        private async void OnContainerizeBtnClickAsync()
 01201        {
 01202            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(await ValidateDockerRequirement()))
 01203            {
 01204                return;
 1205            }
 1206            try
 01207            {
 01208                _containerizeServerBtn.SetEnabled(false);
 01209                hideResultLabels();
 1210
 1211                // build docker image
 01212                if (IsLogLevelDebug)
 01213                    Debug.Log("buildDockerImageAsync");
 01214                ProgressCounter = 0;
 1215
 01216                string dockerfilePath =
 1217                    _dockerfilePathInput.value.Length > 0
 1218                        ? _dockerfilePathInput.value
 1219                        : _dockerfilePathInputDefault;
 1220
 01221                string extraParams =
 1222                    _optionalDockerParamsInput.value.Length > 0
 1223                        ? _optionalDockerParamsInput.value
 1224                        : null;
 1225
 01226                if (_buildPathInput.value.Length > 0)
 01227                {
 01228                    if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(extraParams))
 01229                    {
 01230                        extraParams = $"--build-arg SERVER_BUILD_PATH=\"{_buildPathInput.value}\"";
 01231                    }
 1232                    else
 01233                    {
 01234                        extraParams +=
 1235                            $" --build-arg SERVER_BUILD_PATH=\"{_buildPathInput.value}\"";
 01236                    }
 01237                }
 1238
 01239                string imageName = Tokenize(_containerizeImageNameInput.value);
 01240                string imageRepo = $"{_containerProject}/{imageName}";
 01241                string tag =
 1242                    _containerizeImageTagInput.value == _containerizeImageTagInputDefault
 1243                        ? nowUTC
 1244                        : _containerizeImageTagInput.value;
 1245
 01246                await EdgegapBuildUtils.RunCommand_DockerBuild(
 1247                    dockerfilePath,
 1248                    _containerRegistryUrl,
 1249                    imageRepo,
 1250                    tag,
 1251                    ProjectRootPath,
 01252                    status => ShowWorkInProgress("Building Docker Image", status),
 1253                    extraParams ?? null
 1254                );
 1255
 01256                OnBuildContainerizeUploadSuccess(
 1257                    _containerizeServerResultLabel,
 1258                    "Containerization succeeded."
 1259                );
 1260
 01261                string lowercaseImageName = _containerizeImageNameInput.value;
 1262
 01263                _localTestFoldout.SetValueWithoutNotify(true);
 01264                _localTestImageInput.value = $"{lowercaseImageName}:{tag}";
 01265                _localTestImageShowDropdownBtn.SetEnabled(false);
 01266                _serverImageNameInput.value = lowercaseImageName;
 01267                _serverImageTagInput.value = tag;
 1268
 01269                await GetLocalDockerImagesAsync();
 1270
 01271                if (_localImages is not null && _localImages.Count > 0)
 01272                {
 01273                    _localTestImageShowDropdownBtn.SetEnabled(true);
 01274                }
 01275            }
 01276            catch (Exception e)
 01277            {
 01278                Debug.LogError($"Containerization Error: {e}");
 01279                ShowErrorDialog(
 1280                    e.Message,
 1281                    _containerizeServerResultLabel,
 1282                    "Containerization failed (see logs)."
 1283                );
 01284            }
 1285            finally
 01286            {
 01287                EditorUtility.ClearProgressBar();
 01288                _containerizeServerBtn.SetEnabled(true);
 01289            }
 01290        }
 1291
 1292        private async Task GetLocalDockerImagesAsync()
 01293        {
 01294            if (IsLogLevelDebug)
 01295                Debug.Log("GetLocalDockerImages");
 1296
 01297            _localImages = new List<string>();
 1298
 01299            await EdgegapBuildUtils.RunCommand_DockerImage(
 1300                img =>
 01301                {
 01302                    if (img.Contains($"{_containerRegistryUrl}/{_containerProject}/"))
 01303                    {
 01304                        string shortImg = img.Split(
 1305                            $"{_containerRegistryUrl}/{_containerProject}/"
 1306                        )[1];
 01307                        _localImages.Add(shortImg);
 01308                    }
 01309                },
 1310                error =>
 01311                    ShowErrorDialog(
 1312                        $"Couldn't find local docker images, please ensure Docker is running.\n\n{error}"
 1313                    )
 1314            );
 1315
 01316            UpdateUI();
 01317        }
 1318        #endregion
 1319

 1321        private void OnLocalTestInputFocusIn(FocusInEvent evt)
 01322        {

 01324        }

 1326        private void OnLocalTestInputsChanged(ChangeEvent<string> evt)
