 1331        private async void OnLocalTestImageDropdownClick()
 01332        {
 01333            await GetLocalDockerImagesAsync();
 01334            UnityEditor.PopupWindow.Show(
 1335                _localTestImageShowDropdownBtn.worldBound,
 1336                new CustomPopupContent(
 1337                    _localImages,
 1338                    OnDropdownLocalTestImageSelect,
 1339                    _containerizeImageNameInputDefault
 1340                )
 1341            );
 01342        }
 1343
 1344        private void OnDropdownLocalTestImageSelect(string image)
 01345        {
 01346            _localTestImageInput.value = image;
 01347            _localTestDockerRunInput.Focus();
 01348        }
 1349
 1350        private void OnLocalTestDockerParamsFocusOut(FocusOutEvent evt)
 01351        {
 01352            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(_localTestDockerRunInput.value))
 01353            {
 01354                _localTestDockerRunInput.value = _localTestDockerRunInputDefault;
 01355            }
 1356
 01357            _localTestDeployBtn.SetEnabled(CheckFilledLocalTestInputs());
 01358        }
 1359
 1360        private bool CheckFilledLocalTestInputs()
 01361        {
 01362            return _localTestImageInput.value.Length > 0;
 01363        }
 1364
 1365        private async void OnLocalTestDeployClick()
 01366        {
 1367            try
 01368            {
 01369                hideResultLabels();
 1370
 01371                if (IsLogLevelDebug)
 01372                    Debug.Log("RunLocalImageAsync");
 1373
 1374                string extraParams;
 1375
 01376                if (_localTestDockerRunInput.value.Length > 0)
 01377                {
 01378                    if (_localTestDockerRunInput.value.Contains("-p "))
 01379                    {
 01380                        extraParams = _localTestDockerRunInput.value;
 01381                    }
 1382                    else
 01383                    {
 01384                        extraParams =
 1385                            _localTestDockerRunInput.value + $" {_localTestDockerRunInputDefault}";
 01386                    }
 01387                }
 1388                else
 01389                {
 01390                    extraParams = _localTestDockerRunInputDefault;
 01391                }
 1392
 01393                string img =
 1394                    $"{_containerRegistryUrl}/{_containerProject}/{_localTestImageInput.value}";
 1395
 01396                await EdgegapBuildUtils.RunCommand_DockerRun(img, extraParams);
 01397                OnLocalDeploymentResult(
 1398                    "Container deployed successfully. See more in Docker Desktop or Docker CLI.",
 1399                    true
 1400                );
 01401                _createAppFoldout.SetValueWithoutNotify(true);
 01402            }
 01403            catch (Exception e)
 01404            {
 1405                string labelMsg;
 1406
 01407                if (e.Message.Contains("Conflict"))
 01408                {
 01409                    labelMsg =
 1410                        "Container already running. Make sure to terminate it before starting a new one.";
 01411                }
 1412                else
 01413                {
 01414                    labelMsg =
 1415                        "There was an issue while deploying. See more in Docker Desktop or Docker CLI.";
 01416                    Debug.LogError($"OnLocalTestDeploy Error: {e}");
 01417                }
 1418
 01419                OnLocalDeploymentResult(labelMsg, false);
 01420            }
 01421        }
 1422
 1423        private async void OnLocalTestTerminateCLick()
 01424        {
 1425            try
 01426            {
 01427                hideResultLabels();
 1428
 01429                if (IsLogLevelDebug)
 01430                    Debug.Log("StopLocalImageAsync");
 1431
 01432                await EdgegapBuildUtils.RunCommand_DockerStop();
 01433                OnLocalDeploymentResult("Container terminated successfully.", true);
 1434
 01435                _createAppFoldout.SetValueWithoutNotify(true);
 01436            }
 01437            catch (Exception e)
 01438            {
 01439                if (e.Message.Contains("No such container: edgegap-server-test"))
 01440                {
 01441                    OnLocalDeploymentResult("No deployment found.", true);
 01442                }
 1443                else
 01444                {
 01445                    Debug.LogError($"OnLocalTestTerminate Error: {e}");
 01446                    OnLocalDeploymentResult(
 1447                        "There was an issue while terminating. See more in Docker Desktop or Docker CLI.",
 1448                        false
 1449                    );
 01450                }
 01451            }
 01452        }
 1453
 1454        private void OnLocalDeploymentResult(string msg, bool success)
 01455        {
 01456            _localTestResultLabel.text = EdgegapWindowMetadata.WrapRichTextInColor(
 1457                msg,
 1458                success
 1459                    ? EdgegapWindowMetadata.StatusColors.Success
 1460                    : EdgegapWindowMetadata.StatusColors.Error
 1461            );
 01462            _localTestResultLabel.style.display = DisplayStyle.Flex;
 01463        }
 1464
 1465        private void OnLocalContainerConnectLinkClick() =>
 01466            OpenEdgegapDocsURL(EdgegapWindowMetadata.LOCAL_TEST_CONNECT_INFO_PATH);
 1467        #endregion
 1468
 1469        #region Fns / Upload App
 1470        /// <summary>
 1471        /// Show app name dropdown (Create App section) btn click
 1472        /// </summary>
 1473        private async void OnCreateAppNameDropdownClick()
 01474        {
 1475            try
 01476            {
 01477                _storedAppNames.Clear();
 01478                await GetApps();
 01479            }
 01480            catch (Exception e)
 01481            {
 01482                ShowErrorDialog($"GetApps Error: {e}");
 01483            }
 1484
 01485            List<string> appNameBtns =
 1486                !(_storedAppNames is null) || _storedAppNames.Count > 0
 1487                    ? _storedAppNames
 1488                        .Prepend(EdgegapWindowMetadata.DEFAULT_NEW_APPLICATION_LABEL)
 1489                        .ToList()
 1490                    : new List<string> { EdgegapWindowMetadata.DEFAULT_NEW_APPLICATION_LABEL };
 1491
 01492            UnityEditor.PopupWindow.Show(
 1493                _createAppNameShowDropdownBtn.worldBound,
 1494                new CustomPopupContent(
 1495                    appNameBtns,
 1496                    OnDropdownCreateAppNameSelect,
 1497                    _containerizeImageNameInputDefault
 1498                )
 1499            );
 01500        }
 1501
 1502        /// <summary>
 1503        /// Select an app from the Create App section dropdown btn click
 1504        /// </summary>
 1505        /// <param name="name"></param>
 1506        private void OnDropdownCreateAppNameSelect(string name)
 01507        {
 01508            string appName = Tokenize(name);
 01509            _createAppNameInput.value = appName;
 01510            _serverImageNameInput.Focus();
 01511        }
 1512
 1513        /// <summary>
 1514        /// On change, validate
 1515        /// Toggle create app btn if all required inputs are filled
 1516        /// </summary>
 1517        /// <param name="evt"></param>
 1518        private void OnCreateAppNameInputFocusOut(FocusOutEvent evt)
 01519        {
 1520            // Validate: Only allow alphanumeric, underscore, dash, plus, period
 01521            if (!_appNameAllowedCharsRegex.IsMatch(_createAppNameInput.value))
 01522            {
 01523                ShowErrorDialog(
 1524                    "Your app name contains invalid characters. Only characters [a-zA-Z0-9_-+.] are allowed."
 1525                );
 01526            }
 1527
 01528            _uploadImageCreateAppBtn.SetEnabled(CheckFilledCreateAppInputs());
 01529        }
 1530
 1531        /// <summary>
 1532        /// On change, toggle create app btn if all required inputs in Create App section are filled
 1533        /// </summary>
 1534        /// <param name="evt"></param>
 1535        private void OnCreateInputsChanged(ChangeEvent<string> evt)
 01536        {
 01537            _uploadImageCreateAppBtn.SetEnabled(CheckFilledCreateAppInputs());
 01538        }
 1539
 1540        private bool CheckFilledCreateAppInputs()
 01541        {
 01542            return _createAppNameInput.value.Length > 0
 1543                && _serverImageNameInput.value.Length > 0
 1544                && _serverImageTagInput.value.Length > 0;
 01545        }
 1546
 1547        private void OnPortsMappingLinkClick() =>
 01548            OpenEdgegapDocsURL(EdgegapWindowMetadata.EDGEGAP_DOC_DEPLOY_GUIDE_PATH);
 1549
 1550        /// <summary>
 1551        /// "Upload image and Create app version" btn click
 1552        /// Process UI + validation before/after API logic
 1553        /// </summary>
 1554        private async void OnUploadImageCreateAppBtnClickAsync()
 01555        {
 1556            try
 01557            {
 01558                _uploadImageCreateAppBtn.SetEnabled(false);
 01559                hideResultLabels();
 1560
 1561                // upload image
 01562                if (IsLogLevelDebug)
 01563                    Debug.Log("uploadDockerImageAsync");
 01564                ProgressCounter = 0;
 1565
 01566                string imageRepo = $"{_containerProject}/{_serverImageNameInput.value}";
 01567                string tag = _serverImageTagInput.value;
 1568
 01569                bool isDockerLoginSuccess = await EdgegapBuildUtils.LoginContainerRegistry(
 1570                    _containerRegistryUrl,
 1571                    _containerUsername,
 1572                    _containerToken,
 01573                    status => ShowWorkInProgress("Logging into container registry.", status)
 1574                );
 1575
 01576                if (!isDockerLoginSuccess)
 01577                {
 01578                    throw new Exception("Docker authorization failed (see logs).");
 1579                }
 1580
 01581                string pushError = await EdgegapBuildUtils.RunCommand_DockerPush(
 1582                    _containerRegistryUrl,
 1583                    imageRepo,
 1584                    tag,
 01585                    status => ShowWorkInProgress("Pushing Docker Image", status)
 1586                );
 1587
 01588                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(pushError.Trim()))
 01589                {
 01590                    Debug.LogError(pushError);
 01591                    throw new Exception("Unable to push docker image to registry (see logs).");
 1592                }
 1593
 01594                ShowWorkInProgress("Create Application", "Updating server info on Edgegap");
 1595
 01596                if (IsLogLevelDebug)
 01597                    Debug.Log("createAppAsync");
 1598
 01599                EdgegapAppApi appApi = getAppApi();
 1600
 01601                EdgegapHttpResult<GetCreateAppResult> getAppResult = await appApi.GetApp(
 1602                    _createAppNameInput.value
 1603                );
 1604
 01605                if (!getAppResult.IsResultCode200)
 01606                {
 01607                    CreateAppRequest createAppRequest = new CreateAppRequest(
 1608                        _createAppNameInput.value,
 1609                        isActive: true,
 1610                        ""
 1611                    );
 1612
 01613                    EdgegapHttpResult<GetCreateAppResult> createAppResult = await appApi.CreateApp(
 1614                        createAppRequest
 1615                    );
 1616
 01617                    if (!createAppResult.IsResultCode200)
 01618                    {
 01619                        Debug.LogError(createAppResult.HasErr);
 01620                        throw new Exception(
 1621                            $"Error {createAppResult.StatusCode}: {createAppResult.ReasonPhrase}"
 1622                        );
 1623                    }
 01624                    else if (!_storedAppNames.Contains(_createAppNameInput.value))
 01625                    {
 01626                        _storedAppNames.Add(_createAppNameInput.value);
 01627                    }
 01628                }
 1629
 01630                OpenEdgegapURL(
 1631                    string.Join(
 1632                        "",
 1633                        new string[]
 1634                        {
 1635                            EdgegapWindowMetadata.EDGEGAP_CREATE_APP_BASE_URL,
 1636                            _createAppNameInput.value,
 1637                            "/versions/create/",
 1638                            $"?name={HttpUtility.UrlEncode(_serverImageTagInput.value)}",
 1639                            $"&imageRepo={HttpUtility.UrlEncode(imageRepo)}",
 1640                            $"&dockerTag={HttpUtility.UrlEncode(tag)}",
 1641                            $"&vCPU=1",
 1642                            $"&memory=1",
 1643                        }
 1644                    )
 1645                );
 01646                ;
 1647
 01648                _deployAppFoldout.SetValueWithoutNotify(true);
 01649                _deployAppNameInput.SetValueWithoutNotify(_createAppNameInput.value);
 01650            }
 01651            catch (Exception e)
 01652            {
 01653                if (
 1654                    e.Message.Contains("Docker authorization failed")
 1655                    || e.Message.Contains("Unable to push docker image")
 1656                )
 01657                {
 01658                    ShowErrorDialog(e.Message);
 01659                }
 1660                else
 01661                {
 01662                    Debug.LogError($"OnUploadImageCreateAppBtnClick Error: {e}");
 01663                    ShowErrorDialog("Image upload and app creation failed (see logs).");
 01664                }
 01665            }
 1666            finally
 01667            {
 01668                EditorUtility.ClearProgressBar();
 01669                _uploadImageCreateAppBtn.SetEnabled(true);
 01670            }
 01671        }
 1672
 1673        private EdgegapAppApi getAppApi() =>
 01674            new EdgegapAppApi(
 1675                EdgegapWindowMetadata.API_ENVIRONMENT,
 1676                _apiToken,
 1677                EdgegapWindowMetadata.LOG_LEVEL
 1678            );
 1679
 1680        private void OnBuildContainerizeUploadSuccess(Label displayLabel, string txt)
 01681        {
 01682            EditorUtility.ClearProgressBar();
 1683
 01684            displayLabel.text = EdgegapWindowMetadata.WrapRichTextInColor(
 1685                txt,
 1686                EdgegapWindowMetadata.StatusColors.Success
 1687            );
 01688            displayLabel.visible = true;
 01689        }
 1690
 1691        private void OnYourAppLinkClick() =>
 01692            OpenEdgegapDocsURL(EdgegapWindowMetadata.EDGEGAP_DOC_APP_INFO_PATH);
 1693        #endregion
 1694
 1695        #region Fns / Deploy
 1696        private void OnDeployAppNameInputFocusIn(FocusInEvent evt)
 01697        {
 01698            OnDeployAppNameDropdownClick();
 01699        }
 1700
 1701        /// <summary>
 1702        /// Show app name dropdown (Deploy section) btn click
 1703        /// </summary>
 1704        private async void OnDeployAppNameDropdownClick()
 01705        {
 1706            try
 01707            {
 01708                _storedAppNames.Clear();
 01709                await GetApps();
 01710            }
 01711            catch (Exception e)
 01712            {
 01713                ShowErrorDialog($"GetApps Error: {e}");
 01714            }
 1715
 01716            UnityEditor.PopupWindow.Show(
 1717                _deployAppNameShowDropdownBtn.worldBound,
 1718                new CustomPopupContent(
 1719                    _storedAppNames,
 1720                    OnDropdownDeployAppNameSelect,
 1721                    _containerizeImageNameInputDefault
 1722                )
 1723            );
 01724        }
 1725
 1726        /// <summary>
 1727        /// Select an app from the Deploy section dropdown btn click
 1728        /// </summary>
 1729        /// <param name="name"></param>
 1730        private void OnDropdownDeployAppNameSelect(string name)
 01731        {
 01732            string appName = Regex.Replace(name, @"\s", "_");
 01733            _deployAppNameInput.value = appName;
 01734            _deployAppVersionShowDropdownBtn.Focus();
 01735        }
 1736
 1737        /// <summary>
 1738        /// On change, validate
 1739        /// Toggle deploy app btn if all required inputs in Deploy App section are filled
 1740        /// </summary>
 1741        /// <param name="evt"></param>
 1742        private void OnDeployAppNameInputChanged(ChangeEvent<string> evt)
 01743        {
 01744            DeployAppNameInputChanged(evt.newValue);
 01745        }
 1746
 1747        private async void DeployAppNameInputChanged(string newValue)
 01748        {
 01749            _deployAppBtn.SetEnabled(CheckFilledDeployServerInputs());
 01750            _deployAppVersionShowDropdownBtn.SetEnabled(false);
 1751            try
 01752            {
 01753                if (_storedAppVersions is not null)
 01754                {
 01755                    _storedAppVersions.Clear();
 01756                }
 1757
 01758                if (_storedAppNames is not null && _storedAppNames.Contains(newValue))
 01759                {
 01760                    await GetAppVersions();
 01761                }
 01762            }
 01763            catch (Exception e)
 01764            {
 01765                ShowErrorDialog($"GetAppVersions Error: {e}");
 01766            }
 1767            finally
 01768            {
 01769                if (_storedAppVersions is not null && _storedAppVersions.Count > 0)
 01770                {
 01771                    _deployAppBtn.SetEnabled(CheckFilledDeployServerInputs());
 01772                    _deployAppVersionShowDropdownBtn.SetEnabled(true);
 01773                }
 01774            }
 01775        }
 1776
 1777        private void OnDeployAppVersionInputFocusIn(FocusInEvent evt)
 01778        {
 01779            OnDeployAppVersionDropdownClick();
 01780        }
 1781
 1782        /// <summary>
 1783        /// Show app version dropdown btn click
 1784        /// </summary>
 1785        private async void OnDeployAppVersionDropdownClick()
 01786        {
 01787            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(_deployAppNameInput.value.Trim()))
 01788                return;
 1789
 1790            try
 01791            {
 01792                _storedAppVersions?.Clear();
 01793                await GetAppVersions();
 01794            }
 01795            catch (Exception e)
 01796            {
 01797                ShowErrorDialog($"GetAppVersions Error: {e}");
 01798            }
 1799
 01800            UnityEditor.PopupWindow.Show(
 1801                _deployAppVersionShowDropdownBtn.worldBound,
 1802                new CustomPopupContent(_storedAppVersions, OnDropDownDeployAppVersionSelect, "")
 1803            );
 01804        }
 1805
 1806        /// <summary>
 1807        /// Select an app version from the Deploy section dropdown btn click
 1808        /// </summary>
 1809        /// <param name="version"></param>
 1810        private void OnDropDownDeployAppVersionSelect(string version)
 01811        {
 01812            _deployAppVersionInput.value = version;
 01813            _deployAppBtn.Focus();
 01814        }
 1815
 1816        /// <summary>
 1817        /// On change, toggle deploy app btn if all required inputs in Deploy App section are filled
 1818        /// </summary>
 1819        /// <param name="evt"></param>
 1820        private void OnDeployAppVersionInputChanged(ChangeEvent<string> evt)
 01821        {
 01822            _deployAppBtn.SetEnabled(CheckFilledDeployServerInputs());
 01823        }
 1824
 1825        private void OnDeployLimitLinkClick() =>
 01826            OpenEdgegapURL(EdgegapWindowMetadata.EDGEGAP_FREE_TIER_INFO_URL);
 1827
 1828        /// <summary>
 1829        /// "Deploy to cloud" btn click
 1830        /// Process UI + validation before/after API logic
 1831        /// </summary>
 1832        private async void OnDeploymentCreateBtnClick()
 01833        {
 1834            try
 01835            {
 01836                hideResultLabels();
 1837
 01838                await CreateDeploymentStartServer();
 1839
 01840                _nextStepsFoldout.SetValueWithoutNotify(true);
 01841            }
 01842            catch (Exception e)
 01843            {
 01844                OnCreateDeploymentStartServerFail(e.Message);
 01845            }
 01846        }
 1847
 1848        /// <summary>
 1849        /// Starts a new deployment & waits for it to be READY
 1850        /// </summary>
 1851        private async Task CreateDeploymentStartServer()
 01852        {
 01853            if (IsLogLevelDebug)
 01854                Debug.Log("createDeploymentStartServerAsync");
 1855
 01856            _deployResultLabel.text = EdgegapWindowMetadata.WrapRichTextInColor(
 1857                EdgegapWindowMetadata.DEPLOY_REQUEST_RICH_STR,
 1858                EdgegapWindowMetadata.StatusColors.Processing
 1859            );
 01860            _deployResultLabel.style.display = DisplayStyle.Flex;
 1861
 01862            EdgegapDeploymentsApi deployApi = GetDeployAPI();
 1863
 1864            // Get (+cache) external IP async, required to create a deployment. Prioritize cache.
 01865            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(_userExternalIp))
 01866            {
 01867                EdgegapIpApi ipApi = new EdgegapIpApi(
 1868                    EdgegapWindowMetadata.API_ENVIRONMENT,
 1869                    _apiToken,
 1870                    EdgegapWindowMetadata.LOG_LEVEL
 1871                );
 01872                EdgegapHttpResult<GetYourPublicIpResult> getYourPublicIpResponseTask =
 1873                    await ipApi.GetYourPublicIp();
 1874
 01875                _userExternalIp = getYourPublicIpResponseTask?.Data?.PublicIp;
 01876                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(_userExternalIp))
 01877                {
 01878                    Debug.LogWarning(
 1879                        $"Couldn't retrieve your public IP. {getYourPublicIpResponseTask.Error}"
 1880                    );
 01881                }
 01882            }
 1883
 01884            CreateDeploymentRequest createDeploymentReq = new CreateDeploymentRequest( // MIRROR CHANGE: 'new()' not sup
 1885                _deployAppNameInput.value,
 1886                _deployAppVersionInput.value,
 1887                _userExternalIp
 1888            );
 1889
 1890            // Request to deploy (it won't be active, yet) =>
 01891            EdgegapHttpResult<CreateDeploymentResult> createDeploymentResponse =
 1892                await deployApi.CreateDeploymentAsync(createDeploymentReq);
 01893            if (!createDeploymentResponse.IsResultCode200)
 01894            {
 01895                OnCreateDeploymentStartServerFail(createDeploymentResponse.Error.ErrorMessage);
 01896                return;
 1897            }
 1898            else
 01899            {
 1900                // Update status
 01901                _deployResultLabel.text = EdgegapWindowMetadata.WrapRichTextInColor(
 1902                    "Deployment starting, see Dashboard for details.",
 1903                    EdgegapWindowMetadata.StatusColors.Processing
 1904                );
 1905
 01906                OpenEdgegapURL(EdgegapWindowMetadata.EDGEGAP_DEPLOY_APP_URL);
 01907            }
 1908
 1909            // Check the status of the deployment for READY every 2s =>
 1910            const int pollIntervalSecs = EdgegapWindowMetadata.DEPLOYMENT_READY_STATUS_POLL_SECONDS;
 01911            EdgegapHttpResult<GetDeploymentStatusResult> getDeploymentStatusResponse =
 1912                await deployApi.AwaitReadyStatusAsync(
 1913                    createDeploymentResponse.Data.RequestId,
 1914                    TimeSpan.FromSeconds(pollIntervalSecs)
 1915                );
 1916
 1917            // Process create deployment response
 01918            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(getDeploymentStatusResponse?.Error?.ErrorMessage))
 01919            {
 01920                _deployResultLabel.text = EdgegapWindowMetadata.WrapRichTextInColor(
 1921                    "Server deployed successfully. Don't forget to remove the deployment after testing.",
 1922                    EdgegapWindowMetadata.StatusColors.Success
 1923                );
 01924                _deployResultLabel.style.display = DisplayStyle.Flex;
 01925            }
 1926            else
 01927            {
 01928                OnCreateDeploymentStartServerFail(getDeploymentStatusResponse.Error.ErrorMessage);
 01929            }
 01930        }
 1931
 1932        /// <summary>
 1933        /// CreateDeployment fail handler.
 1934        /// </summary>
 1935        /// <param name="reachedNumDeploymentsHardcap">if maximum number of deployments was reached</param>
 1936        /// <param name="message">error message to log</param>
 1937        private void OnCreateDeploymentStartServerFail(string message = null)
 01938        {
 01939            ShowErrorDialog(
 1940                message ?? "Unknown Error, see Unity Console.",
 1941                _deployResultLabel,
 1942                "There was an issue, see Unity console for details."
 1943            );
 01944            Debug.Log(
 1945                "See deployments on Dashboard: https://app.edgegap.com/deployment-management/deployments/list"
 1946            );
 01947        }
 1948
 1949        /// <summary>
 1950        /// "Stop last deployment" btn click
 1951        /// Process UI + validation before/after API logic
 1952        /// </summary>
 1953        private async void OnStopLastDeployClick()
 01954        {
 1955            try
 01956            {
 01957                hideResultLabels();
 1958
 01959                if (IsLogLevelDebug)
 01960                    Debug.Log("GetStopLastDeploymentAsync");
 1961
 1962                string _deploymentRequestId;
 01963                EdgegapDeploymentsApi deployApi = GetDeployAPI();
 1964
 01965                if (IsLogLevelDebug)
 01966                    Debug.Log("GetQuickstartDeploymentsAsync");
 1967
 01968                List<string> quickstartDeploymentIds = await GetQuickstartDeployments();
 1969
 01970                if (quickstartDeploymentIds.Count > 0)
 01971                {
 01972                    _deploymentRequestId = quickstartDeploymentIds[0];
 01973                }
 1974                else
 01975                {
 01976                    OnGetStopLastDeploymentResult("No quickstart deployment found", true);
 01977                    return;
 1978                }
 1979
 1980                //Stop request
 01981                EdgegapHttpResult<StopActiveDeploymentResult> stopDeploymentResponse =
 1982                    await deployApi.StopActiveDeploymentAsync(_deploymentRequestId);
 1983
 01984                _deployResultLabel.text = EdgegapWindowMetadata.WrapRichTextInColor(
 1985                    "Stopping...",
 1986                    EdgegapWindowMetadata.StatusColors.Warn
 1987                );
 01988                _deployResultLabel.style.display = DisplayStyle.Flex;
 1989
 01990                if (!stopDeploymentResponse.IsResultCode200)
 01991                {
 01992                    OnGetStopLastDeploymentResult(stopDeploymentResponse.Error.ErrorMessage, false);
 01993                    return;
 1994                }
 1995
 1996                //Check status of deployment for STOPPED every 2s
 01997                TimeSpan pollIntervalSecs = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(
 1998                    EdgegapWindowMetadata.DEPLOYMENT_STOP_STATUS_POLL_SECONDS
 1999                );
 02000                stopDeploymentResponse = await deployApi.AwaitTerminatedDeleteStatusAsync(
 2001                    _deploymentRequestId,
 2002                    pollIntervalSecs
 2003                );
 2004
 2005                //Process response
 02006                if (!stopDeploymentResponse.IsResultCode410)
 02007                {
 02008                    OnGetStopLastDeploymentResult(stopDeploymentResponse.Error.ErrorMessage, false);
 02009                }
 2010                else
 02011                {
 02012                    OnGetStopLastDeploymentResult("Deployment stopped successfully", true);
 02013                }
 2014
 02015                _nextStepsFoldout.SetValueWithoutNotify(true);
 02016            }
 02017            catch (Exception e)
 02018            {
 02019                OnGetStopLastDeploymentResult(e.Message, false);
 02020                OpenEdgegapURL(EdgegapWindowMetadata.EDGEGAP_DEPLOY_APP_URL);
 02021            }
 02022        }
 2023
 2024        private void OnGetStopLastDeploymentResult(string msg, bool success)
 02025        {
 02026            _deployResultLabel.text = EdgegapWindowMetadata.WrapRichTextInColor(
 2027                msg,
 2028                success
 2029                    ? EdgegapWindowMetadata.StatusColors.Success
 2030                    : EdgegapWindowMetadata.StatusColors.Error
 2031            );
 02032            _deployResultLabel.style.display = DisplayStyle.Flex;
 02033        }
 2034
 2035        private bool CheckFilledDeployServerInputs()
 02036        {
 02037            return _deployAppNameInput.value.Trim().Length > 0
 2038                && _deployAppVersionInput.value.Trim().Length > 0;
 02039        }
 2040
 2041        private async Task<List<string>> GetQuickstartDeployments()
 02042        {
 02043            EdgegapDeploymentsApi deployApi = GetDeployAPI();
 2044
 02045            EdgegapHttpResult<GetDeploymentsResult> getDeploymentsResponse =
 2046                await deployApi.GetDeploymentsAsync();
 2047
 02048            if (!getDeploymentsResponse.IsResultCode200)
 02049            {
 02050                return new List<string>();
 2051            }
 2052
 02053            List<GetDeploymentResult> quickstartDeploys = getDeploymentsResponse
 2054                .Data.Data.Where(deploy =>
 02055                    deploy.Tags is not null
 2056                    && deploy.Tags.Contains(EdgegapWindowMetadata.DEFAULT_DEPLOYMENT_TAG)
 2057                )
 2058                .ToList();
 02059            return quickstartDeploys.Select(deploy => deploy.RequestId).ToList();
 02060        }
 2061        #endregion
 2062
 2063        #region Fns / Next
 2064        private void OnServerConnectLinkClick() =>
 02065            OpenEdgegapDocsURL(EdgegapWindowMetadata.CONNECT_TO_DEPLOYMENT_INFO_URL);
 2066
 2067        private void OnGen2MatchmakerLinkClick() =>
 02068            OpenEdgegapDocsURL(EdgegapWindowMetadata.EDGEGAP_DOC_MANAGED_MATCHMAKER_PATH);
 2069
 2070        private void OnAdvMatchmakerLinkClick() =>
 02071            OpenEdgegapDocsURL(EdgegapWindowMetadata.EDGEGAP_DOC_ADV_MATCHMAKER_PATH);
 2072
 2073        private void OnScalingLifecycleLinkClick() =>
 02074            OpenEdgegapDocsURL(EdgegapWindowMetadata.SCALING_LIFECYCLE_INFO_URL);
 2075        #endregion
 2076
 2077        #region Fns / Discord
 2078        private void OnDiscordBtnClick() =>
 02079            Application.OpenURL(EdgegapWindowMetadata.EDGEGAP_DISCORD_URL);
 2080        #endregion
 2081
 2082        #region State Management
 2083        private void ShowErrorDialog(
 2084            string dialogMsg,
 2085            Label displayLabel = null,
 2086            string labelTxt = null
 2087        )
 02088        {
 02089            EditorUtility.ClearProgressBar();
 2090
 02091            if (displayLabel is not null && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(labelTxt))
 02092            {
 02093                displayLabel.text = EdgegapWindowMetadata.WrapRichTextInColor(
 2094                    labelTxt,
 2095                    EdgegapWindowMetadata.StatusColors.Error
 2096                );
 02097                displayLabel.visible = true;
 02098            }
 2099
 02100            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(dialogMsg))
 02101            {
 02102                EditorUtility.DisplayDialog("Error", dialogMsg, "Ok");
 02103            }
 02104        }
 2105
 2106        private void ShowWorkInProgress(string title, string status)
 02107        {
 02108            EditorUtility.DisplayProgressBar(title, status, ProgressCounter++ / 50);
 02109        }
 2110
 2111        private async Task InitializeState()
 02112        {
 02113            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(_apiToken))
 02114            {
 2115                //show Sign In btn
 02116                ToggleIsConnectedContainers(false);
 02117                return;
 2118            }
 2119            else
 02120            {
 2121                //show API Token field/btns + Sign Out btn
 02122                ToggleIsConnectedContainers(true);
 02123            }
 2124
 02125            if (IsLogLevelDebug)
 02126                Debug.Log(
 2127                    "syncFormWithObjectDynamicAsync: Found apiToken; "
 2128                        + "calling verifyApiTokenGetRegistryCredsAsync =>"
 2129                );
 02130            await verifyApiTokenGetRegistryCreds();
 2131
 02132            if (_isApiTokenVerified)
 02133            {
 02134                if (IsLogLevelDebug)
 02135                    Debug.Log("syncFormWithObjectDynamicAsync: Found apiToken;");
 2136
 02137                _signOutBtn.SetEnabled(false);
 2138
 02139                _createAppNameShowDropdownBtn.SetEnabled(false);
 02140                _deployAppNameShowDropdownBtn.SetEnabled(false);
 2141
 2142                try
 02143                {
 02144                    if (IsLogLevelDebug)
 02145                        Debug.Log("GetAppsAsync");
 2146
 02147                    await GetApps();
 02148                }
 2149                finally
 02150                {
 02151                    _createAppNameShowDropdownBtn.SetEnabled(true);
 2152
 02153                    if (_storedAppNames is not null && _storedAppNames.Count > 0)
 02154                    {
 02155                        _deployAppNameShowDropdownBtn.SetEnabled(true);
 02156                    }
 02157                }
 2158
 02159                if (IsLogLevelDebug)
 02160                    Debug.Log(
 2161                        "syncFormWithObjectDynamicAsync: Found apiToken; "
 2162                            + "calling GetLocalDockerImagesAsync =>"
 2163                    );
 2164
 02165                _localTestImageShowDropdownBtn.SetEnabled(false);
 2166
 2167                try
 02168                {
 02169                    await GetLocalDockerImagesAsync();
 02170                }
 2171                finally
 02172                {
 02173                    if (_localImages is not null && _localImages.Count > 0)
 02174                    {
 02175                        _localTestImageShowDropdownBtn.SetEnabled(true);
 02176                    }
 02177                }
 2178
 02179                _signOutBtn.SetEnabled(true);
 02180                UpdateUI();
 02181            }
 2182
 2183            // Was the API token verified + we found a cached appName in Deploy section? Load the app versions for the d
 2184            // But ignore errs, since we're just *assuming* the app exists since the appName was filled
 02185            if (_isApiTokenVerified && _deployAppNameInput.value.Length > 0)
 02186            {
 02187                if (IsLogLevelDebug)
 02188                    Debug.Log(
 2189                        "syncFormWithObjectDynamicAsync: Found apiToken && deployAppName value; "
 2190                            + "calling GetAppVersionsAsync =>"
 2191                    );
 2192
 02193                _signOutBtn.SetEnabled(false);
 02194                _deployAppVersionShowDropdownBtn.SetEnabled(false);
 2195
 2196                try
 02197                {
 02198                    await GetAppVersions();
 02199                }
 2200                finally
 02201                {
 02202                    if (_storedAppVersions is not null && _storedAppVersions.Count > 0)
 02203                    {
 02204                        _deployAppVersionShowDropdownBtn.SetEnabled(true);
 02205                    }
 02206                }
 2207
 02208                _signOutBtn.SetEnabled(true);
 02209            }
 2210
 2211            // Was the API token verified + found stored deployment ID?
 2212            // refresh to see if it's still running
 02213            if (_isApiTokenVerified)
 02214            {
 02215                if (IsLogLevelDebug)
 02216                    Debug.Log(
 2217                        "syncFormWithObjectDynamicAsync: Found apiToken && _deploymentRequestId; "
 2218                            + "calling RefreshDeploymentsAsync =>"
 2219                    );
 02220            }
 02221        }
 2222
 2223        /// <summary>
 2224        /// Toggle container groups and foldouts on/off based on:
 2225        /// - _isApiTokenVerified
 2226        /// </summary>
 2227        private void UpdateUI()
 02228        {
 02229            _postAuthContainer.SetEnabled(_isApiTokenVerified); // Entire body container
 02230            _serverBuildFoldout.SetEnabled(_isApiTokenVerified);
 02231            _containerizeFoldout.SetEnabled(_isApiTokenVerified);
 02232            _localTestFoldout.SetEnabled(_isApiTokenVerified);
 02233            _createAppFoldout.SetEnabled(_isApiTokenVerified);
 02234            _deployAppFoldout.SetEnabled(_isApiTokenVerified);
 02235            _nextStepsFoldout.SetEnabled(_isApiTokenVerified);
 2236
 02237            if (!_isApiTokenVerified)
 02238            {
 02239                _serverBuildFoldout.SetValueWithoutNotify(false);
 02240                _containerizeFoldout.SetValueWithoutNotify(false);
 02241                _localTestFoldout.SetValueWithoutNotify(false);
 02242                _createAppFoldout.SetValueWithoutNotify(false);
 02243                _deployAppFoldout.SetValueWithoutNotify(false);
 02244                _nextStepsFoldout.SetValueWithoutNotify(false);
 02245            }
 2246            else
 02247            {
 02248                _serverBuildFoldout.SetValueWithoutNotify(true);
 2249
 2250                // Set default values if empty fields
 02251                TogglePlaceholder(_buildFolderNameInput, _buildFolderNameInputDefault, false);
 02252                TogglePlaceholder(_buildPathInput, _buildPathInputDefault, false);
 02253                TogglePlaceholder(
 2254                    _containerizeImageNameInput,
 2255                    _containerizeImageNameInputDefault,
 2256                    false
 2257                );
 02258                TogglePlaceholder(
 2259                    _containerizeImageTagInput,
 2260                    _containerizeImageTagInputDefault,
 2261                    false
 2262                );
 02263                TogglePlaceholder(_dockerfilePathInput, _dockerfilePathInputDefault, false);
 02264                if (_localImages is not null && _localImages.Count > 0)
 02265                {
 02266                    TogglePlaceholder(_localTestImageInput, _localImages[0], false);
 02267                    string[] localImageAndVersion = _localImages[0].Split(":");
 2268
 02269                    if (_storedAppNames is null || _storedAppNames.Count == 0)
 02270                    {
 02271                        _createAppNameInput.SetValueWithoutNotify(localImageAndVersion[0]);
 02272                        _deployAppNameInput.SetValueWithoutNotify("");
 02273                        _deployAppVersionInput.SetValueWithoutNotify("");
 02274                    }
 02275                    TogglePlaceholder(_serverImageNameInput, localImageAndVersion[0], false);
 02276                    TogglePlaceholder(_serverImageTagInput, localImageAndVersion[1], false);
 02277                }
 2278                else
 02279                {
 02280                    _localTestImageInput.SetValueWithoutNotify("");
 02281                    _createAppNameInput.SetValueWithoutNotify("");
 02282                    _serverImageNameInput.SetValueWithoutNotify("");
 02283                    _serverImageTagInput.SetValueWithoutNotify("");
 02284                }
 02285                TogglePlaceholder(_localTestDockerRunInput, _localTestDockerRunInputDefault, false);
 2286
 02287                if (_storedAppNames is not null && _storedAppNames.Count == 1)
 02288                {
 02289                    OnDropdownCreateAppNameSelect(_storedAppNames[0]);
 02290                    TogglePlaceholder(_deployAppNameInput, _storedAppNames[0], false);
 02291                }
 2292
 2293                //open other foldouts if (non-default) persistent data is found in inputs
 02294                if (
 2295                    _buildPathInput.value.Trim().Length > 0
 2296                    || _containerizeImageNameInput.value.Trim().Length > 0
 2297                    || _containerizeImageTagInput.value.Trim().Length > 0
 2298                    || (
 2299                        _dockerfilePathInput.value.Trim().Length > 0
 2300                        && _dockerfilePathInput.value != _dockerfilePathInputDefault
 2301                    )
 2302                    || _optionalDockerParamsInput.value.Trim().Length > 0
 2303                )
 02304                    _containerizeFoldout.SetValueWithoutNotify(true);
 2305
 02306                if (
 2307                    _localTestImageInput.value.Trim().Length > 0
 2308                    || (
 2309                        _localTestDockerRunInput.value.Trim().Length > 0
 2310                        && _localTestDockerRunInput.value != _localTestDockerRunInputDefault
 2311                    )
 2312                )
 02313                    _localTestFoldout.SetValueWithoutNotify(true);
 2314
 02315                if (
 2316                    _createAppNameInput.value.Trim().Length > 0
 2317                    || _serverImageNameInput.value.Trim().Length > 0
 2318                    || _serverImageTagInput.value.Trim().Length > 0
 2319                )
 02320                    _createAppFoldout.SetValueWithoutNotify(true);
 2321
 02322                if (
 2323                    _deployAppNameInput.value.Trim().Length > 0
 2324                    || _deployAppVersionInput.value.Trim().Length > 0
 2325                )
 02326                    _deployAppFoldout.SetValueWithoutNotify(true);
 02327            }
 02328        }
 2329
 2330        private async Task GetApps()
 02331        {
 02332            EdgegapAppApi appApi = getAppApi();
 02333            EdgegapHttpResult<GetAppsResult> getAppsResult = await appApi.GetApps();
 2334
 02335            if (getAppsResult.IsResultCode200)
 02336            {
 02337                GetAppsResult existingApps = getAppsResult.Data;
 02338                _storedAppNames = existingApps.Applications.Select(app => app.AppName).ToList();
 2339
 02340                if (!_storedAppNames.Contains(_deployAppNameInput.value))
 02341                {
 2342                    // select if only one option, otherwise clear
 02343                    if (_storedAppNames.Count == 1)
 02344                    {
 02345                        _deployAppNameInput.value = _storedAppNames[0];
 02346                    }
 2347                    else
 02348                    {
 02349                        _deployAppNameInput.value = "";
 02350                    }
 02351                }
 02352            }
 2353            else
 02354            {
 02355                Debug.LogWarning(
 2356                    $"Unable to retrieve applications.\n"
 2357                        + $"Status {getAppsResult.StatusCode}: {getAppsResult.ReasonPhrase}"
 2358                );
 02359            }
 02360        }
 2361
 2362        private async Task GetAppVersions()
 02363        {
 02364            if (IsLogLevelDebug)
 02365                Debug.Log("GetAppVersions");
 2366
 02367            EdgegapAppApi appApi = getAppApi();
 02368            EdgegapHttpResult<GetAppVersionsResult> getAppVersionsResult =
 2369                await appApi.GetAppVersions(_deployAppNameInput.value);
 2370
 02371            if (getAppVersionsResult.IsResultCode200)
 02372            {
 02373                GetAppVersionsResult appVersionsData = getAppVersionsResult.Data;
 2374
 02375                List<VersionData> activeVersions = appVersionsData
 02376                    .Versions.Where(version => version.IsActive)
 2377                    .ToList();
 02378                _storedAppVersions = activeVersions.Select(version => version.Name).ToList();
 2379
 2380                // select if only one option, otherwise clear
 02381                if (_storedAppVersions.Count == 1)
 02382                {
 02383                    OnDropDownDeployAppVersionSelect(_storedAppVersions[0]);
 02384                }
 2385                else
 02386                {
 02387                    OnDropDownDeployAppVersionSelect("");
 02388                }
 02389            }
 2390            else
 02391            {
 02392                Debug.LogWarning(
 2393                    $"Unable to retrieve app versions for application {_deployAppNameInput.value}.\n"
 2394                        + $"Status {getAppVersionsResult.StatusCode}: {getAppVersionsResult.ReasonPhrase}"
 2395                );
 02396            }
 02397        }
 2398
 2399        private EdgegapDeploymentsApi GetDeployAPI()
 02400        {
 02401            if (_deployAPI is null)
 02402            {
 02403                _deployAPI = new EdgegapDeploymentsApi(
 2404                    EdgegapWindowMetadata.API_ENVIRONMENT,
 2405                    _apiToken,
 2406                    EdgegapWindowMetadata.LOG_LEVEL
 2407                );
 02408            }
 02409            return _deployAPI;
 02410        }
 2411        #endregion
 2412
 2413        #region Utility / TextField
 2414        // <summary>
 2415        // Toggle specified placeholder value, with the option to force state.
 2416        /// <param name="input">TextField element to toggle state on.</param>
 2417        /// <param name="placeholder">Placeholder value to use.</param>
 2418        /// <param name="focus">Input focused or not.</param>
 2419        // </summary>
 2420        private void TogglePlaceholder(TextField input, string placeholder, bool focus)
 02421        {
 2422            // if custom non-empty value provided, disable placeholder class and do nothing
 02423            if (input.value.ToString() != placeholder && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(input.value.Trim()))
 02424            {
 02425                return;
 2426            }
 2427
 02428            if (focus)
 02429            {
 02430                input.SetValueWithoutNotify("");
 02431            }
 2432            else
 02433            {
 02434                input.SetValueWithoutNotify(placeholder);
 02435            }
 02436        }
 2437
 2438        private string Tokenize(string input)
 02439        {
 02440            return Regex.Replace(input.Trim(), @"[\W]+", "-");
 02441        }
 2442        #endregion
 2443
 2444        #region Utility / Browser
 2445        private void OpenEdgegapURL(string URL) =>
 02446            Application.OpenURL(
 2447                $"{URL}{(URL.Contains("?") ? "&" : "?")}{EdgegapWindowMetadata.DEFAULT_UTM_TAGS}"
 2448            );
 2449
 2450        private void OpenEdgegapDocsURL(string path) =>
 2451            // TODO: append "?{EdgegapWindowMetadata.DEFAULT_UTM_TAGS}"
 02452            Application.OpenURL($"{EdgegapWindowMetadata.EDGEGAP_DOC_BASE_URL}{path}");
 2453        #endregion
 2454
 2455        #region Utility / HTTP
 2456        public static string Base64Encode(string plainText)
 02457        {
 02458            byte[] plainBytes = Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(plainText);
 02459            return Convert.ToBase64String(plainBytes);
 02460        }
 2461
 2462        public static string Base64Decode(string base64EncodedText)
 02463        {
 02464            byte[] base64Bytes = Convert.FromBase64String(base64EncodedText);
 02465            return Encoding.UTF8.GetString(base64Bytes);
 02466        }
 2467        #endregion
 2468    }
 2469}
 2470
 2471#endif
 2472#endif
